---
title: "Study 1 Descriptive"
author: "Spike"
date: "2026-01-06"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Load Libraries
```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
```

## Load Data
``` {r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
path <- "Data/Study_1_Objective_Data.xlsx"
df <- read_excel(path)

if (!("accuracy_rate" %in% names(df))) {
  if ("sum_score" %in% names(df)) {
    df <- df %>% mutate(accuracy_rate = as.numeric(sum_score) / 6)
  } else if (all(paste0("score", 1:6) %in% names(df))) {
    df <- df %>%
      mutate(
        accuracy_rate = rowSums(across(all_of(paste0("score", 1:6))), na.rm = TRUE) / 6
      )
  } else {
    stop("Cannot find accuracy_rate (or sum_score / score1-6) to compute accuracy.")
  }
}
df <- df %>% mutate(accuracy_rate = as.numeric(accuracy_rate))
```

## Table 1
``` {r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
tbl1 <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Platform = case_when(
      software == "chatgpt" ~ "OpenAI",
      software == "deepseek" ~ "DeepSeek",
      software == "tongyi" ~ "Alibaba",
      software == "gemini" ~ "Google",
      software == "claude" ~ "Anthropic",
      software == "Grok" ~ "xAI",
      TRUE ~ as.character(software)
    ),
    Model = case_when(
      software == "chatgpt" & model == "o1" ~ "OpenAI o1",
      software == "chatgpt" & model == "gpt-4o" ~ "GPT-4o",
      software == "chatgpt" & model == "gpt-4.5" ~ "GPT-4.5",
      software == "chatgpt" & model == "gpt-o3" ~ "OpenAI o3",
      software == "chatgpt" & model == "gpt-o4-mini" ~ "OpenAI o4-mini",
      software == "chatgpt" & model == "gpt-o4-mini-high" ~ "OpenAI o4-mini-high",
      software == "deepseek" & model == "V3" ~ "DeepSeek-V3",
      software == "deepseek" & model == "R1" ~ "DeepSeek-R1",
      software == "tongyi" & model == "2.5" ~ "Qwen 2.5",
      software == "gemini" & str_detect(model, "2\\.5") ~ "Gemini 2.5 Pro",
      software == "gemini" & str_detect(model, "2\\.0") ~ "Gemini 2.0 Flash",
      software == "claude" & model == "3.7 Sonnet" ~ "Claude 3.7 Sonnet",
      software == "claude" & str_detect(model, "Extended") ~ "Claude 3.7 Sonnet (Extended)",
      software == "Grok" & model == "Grok 3 Think" ~ "Grok 3 Think",
      software == "Grok" & model == "Grok 3" ~ "Grok 3",
      TRUE ~ as.character(model)
    ),
    Mode = if_else(as.integer(Thinking_Model) == 1, "Thinking", "Standard")
  ) %>%
  group_by(Platform, Model, Mode) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    M = mean(accuracy_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD = sd(accuracy_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    `Overall accuracy M(SD)` = sprintf("%.2f (%.2f)", M, SD)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(M), Platform, Model) %>%
  mutate(
    Rank = row_number(),
    `Used in Study 2` = case_when(
      Rank <= 2 ~ "Top",
      Rank >= n() - 1 ~ "Bottom",
      TRUE ~ ""
    )
  ) %>%
  select(Rank, Platform, Model, Mode, `Overall accuracy M(SD)`, `Used in Study 2`, n)

tbl1
```
